description_long: This is a standard claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a two-tone handle. The head is made of steel, with one side presenting a flat striking face for driving nails and the opposite side forming a curved claw for nail removal. The handle is slightly curved for ergonomic grip, with a yellow midsection and a black, textured lower portion likely made of rubber or a similar grippy material. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, indicating a solid construction. The hammer appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage. Its design is practical and suitable for a variety of urban tasks, such as carpentry, repairs, or construction work.
description: A claw hammer with a steel head and a yellow-and-black ergonomic handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal. The handle is textured for grip and the hammer appears in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the hammer, with the handle's yellow and black coloration visible and the head's width apparent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full shape of the hammer, including the flat striking face, curved claw, and ergonomic handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slim silhouette of the hammer and the alignment of the handle with the head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hammer's head profile, including the striking face and the pronounced curve of the claw.
attribute_handle_type: Curved fiberglass handle with a yellow midsection and a black rubberized ergonomic grip, featuring textured enhancements for improved hold.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head made of steel, with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the opposite side.
